PUBLISH WITH CHARIOTADS

Do you want the advertising on your website to be elite? What about malware-free, adware-free, and scam-free? You've come to the right place, because Chariotads cares about your website and traffic as much as you do. If something goes wrong, we will do everything we can to make it right.

BECOME A PUBLISHERBECOME AN ADVERTISER

BANNER ADS

OPTIMIZED BANNERS

Banners optimized for Mobile, Desktop, Tablet, or Smart TV / Console traffic with our advanced targeting, to ensure you get exactly the type of traffic you want.

EXCLUSIVE MARKETPLACE

Our exclusive marketplace provides both network campaigns or flat rate "Direct Buy" purchases, for the ultimate choice.

MAXIMIZE REVENUE

Our network offers a dual solution of CPC and CPM ads paying a combination of per click and per impression at the highest possible revenue for you.

MULTIPLE SIZES

We offer a wide variety of IAB Standard banner sizes as well as some non-standard unique sizes for your Publishing needs.

BANNER SIZES

  • 300x250 - Medium Rectangle
  • 728x90 - Leaderboard
  • 160x600 - Skyscraper
  • 300x100 - Native Advertising
  • 120x240 - Vertical Banner
  • 125x125 - Square Button, with title
  • 150x150 - Square Button, with title
  • 250x250 - Square
  • 468x60 - Full Banner

MOBILE

  • 300x100
  • 300x250
  • 300x50

SPECIAL FORMATS

  • 300x250 - Layer/Float Ads
  • 300x250 - Video Ads
  • 300x300 - Native Ads
GET STARTED NOW

POP UNDERS

MAXIMUM EXPOSURE

PopUnders allow your promotion to be loaded behind the active window and then available to be seen when the visitor closes the window. Voila! Instant attention.

QUALITY TESTED

We ensure quality and "clean" (malware and scam-free) pop advertisements through rigorous testing and constant monitoring for quality assurance.

TARGETED MARKETING

Target different traffic types such as Mobile, Desktop, or Tablet using many targeting options to deliver just the most profitable traffic to your offers.

CUSTOMER CARE

We care about your visitors as much as you do and our ethical standards of what is allowed in our network far exceeds all competing networks.

START MAKING MONEY WITH
CHARIOTADS TODAY!
